blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,807 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
